title: ilex tsangii var. tsangii
intro: Ilex tsangii var. tsangii is a variety of the Ilex tsangii plant, commonly known as the Chinese holly or Tsang's holly, a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Tibetan medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex tsangii var. tsangii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Ilex tsangii var. tsangii include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
